outreach_events.body:
Saw your post about cutting BDR ramp from 90 to 45 days — that's one of the harder things to pull off while you're scaling a team post-Series C.

We help VP Sales leaders at UK fintechs build the onboarding and pipeline-methodology layer that makes that kind of compression repeatable, not a one-off.

Worth a 15-minute call, or too early in the quarter?

— [Your Name]

Reply STOP and I'll remove you from outreach.

outreach_events.subject: [SANDBOX] → priya.malhotra@iwoca.co.uk  |  £3B milestone + scaling outbound
outreach_events.body:
Saw the £3B SME lending milestone — and your LinkedIn post about hitting outbound-qualified pipeline targets. That combination usually means BDR capacity is the next constraint.

We work with Heads of Revenue at UK fintechs to build the outbound engine that keeps pace with that kind of growth — especially when you're actively hiring BDRs and need ramp to actually stick.

Is scaling outbound a priority this quarter, or too early?

— [Your Name]

Reply STOP and I'll remove you from outreach.

Looking forward to it.

OPENER (permission-based pattern):
"Hi Nicholas, this is [Your Name] from [Your Company]. I know I'm catching you out of the blue — do you have 27 seconds for me to explain why I'm calling, or should I try you another time?"

IF THEY SAY GO AHEAD (three beats, ≤45 seconds total):
1. Context: "I work with VP Sales leaders at seed-stage B2B fintech companies on building outbound pipeline engines before their Series A."
2. Hook: "Saw AcmePay is going after the payfac-as-a-service space — that embedded payments motion typically means a complex sale that needs a tight outbound system early."
3. Question: "Does building that outbound pipeline infrastructure come up as a priority right now, or is it too early?"

THEN STOP AND LISTEN.

IF NOT A GOOD TIME:
"Totally fair. What day usually works better for a 15-minute conversation — Tuesday or Thursday?"

IF SEND AN EMAIL:
"Happy to — what's the best address and what would be most useful to include?"

IF VOICEMAIL (≤20 seconds):
"Hi Nicholas, this is [Your Name] from [Your Company]. I work with VP Sales leaders at seed-stage fintechs on outbound pipeline ahead of Series A — AcmePay's payfac positioning is exactly the space where this matters early. Call me back at [number], or I'll also send a quick email. Thanks."
[Follow up with email after leaving voicemail.]
